resume_context.last_turn_summary:
Expanded the `@moduledoc` in [app_server.ex](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-43/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/app_server.ex#L2) so it now documents the module’s role as the Codex app-server JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio client, the `start_session/2` -> `run_turn/4` -> `stop_session/1` lifecycle, how approval and sandbox policies are applied at thread and turn start, and how dynamic tools are registered and executed. I also updated the issue progress record in [CLZ-43.md](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-43/.symphony/progress/CLZ-43.md#L9).

I did not run repo validation or tests, per the `implement` turn rules. I did make the required `report_agent_turn_result` call once through the repo’s own dynamic-tool path.
